4 New Project Support to KHAS within the Scope of TUBITAK ARDEB 1001 Program

TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 program 1st term of 2024

According to the results,

4

of our research projects were eligible for support.

While the support rate for projects submitted in the first semester of 2024 is

17.

9

% across Turkey, this rate is

36.6%

at our university.

We congratulate our project managers, researchers and advisors whose projects were supported, and thank our referee professors who served on our panels for their contributions.

Supported project information is provided in the table below.
